title: Kartixx's Alpha Sound Pack | The Old/Classic Sounds of Minecraft
description: Bring Minecraft's classic sounds to the latest version with Kartixx's Alpha Sound Pack.
body:
![Kartixx's ASP | Back to Alpha!](https://i.imgur.com/urqalJo.png)

Bring Minecraft's classic sounds to the latest version with **Kartixx's Alpha Sound Pack**.  
  
This carefully crafted resource pack replaces selected sounds from the latest edition with their original, cherished counterparts from the past. Experience the classic boom of Creeper and TNT explosions, savor the familiar creak of doors and chests, and relive Steve's UUAGH. **Kartixx's Alpha Sound Pack** maintains the integrity of most of the new sounds introduced by Mojang. The goal of this retro sound pack is to preserve the nostalgia and enhance your alpha immersion with a perfect blend of old and new.  
  
If you have any issues or questions, let me know [on the pack's Planet Minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/kartixx-s-oas-sound-pack-minecraft-1-13-2).

**List of Changes for:** [1.20.2-1.14](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alpha-sound-pack/version/SL8wsyyf)
  
**Main Pack Changes:**  
- All Player Damage changed to original sounds (UUAGH)  
- Rain changed to original sounds  
- All doors changed to original sounds  
- All trapdoors changed to original sounds  
- All fence gates changed to original sounds  
- Chests changed to original sounds  
- Lily Pads changed to original sounds  
- Soul Sand changed to original sounds  
- Grass Blocks changed to original sounds  
- Dirt changed to original sounds  
- Gravel changed to original sounds  
- Sand changed to original sounds  
- Stone changed to original sounds  
- Snow changed to original sounds  
- Wool changed to original sounds  
- Leaves changed to original sounds  
- Wood changed to original sounds  
- TNT (explosions) changed to original sounds  
- Pistons changed to original sounds  
- Flint and Steel changed to original sounds  
- Fire changed to original sounds  
- Bow changed to original sounds  
- Water changed to original sounds  
- Lava changed to original sounds  
- Splashing changed to original sounds  
- Cows changed to original sounds  
- Creepers (explosions) changed to original sounds  
- Endermen changed to original sounds  
- Sheep changed to original sounds  
- Skeletons changed to original sounds  
- Slimes changed to original sounds  
  
**Pack Immersion Exceptions:**  
- Berry Bush, Drowning, and Fire Damage imitate original player damage sounds  
- Crossbow imitates original bow sounds  
- Barrels and Enderchests imitate original chest toggle sounds  
- Basalt, Calcite, Dripstone, Deepslate, Tuff, Blackstone, Netherrack, and Coral Blocks imitate original stone dig sounds  
- Basalt, Calcite, Dripstone, Deepslate, Tuff, Blackstone, Netherrack, and Coral Blocks imitate original stone step sounds  
- Rooted Dirt and Soul Soil imitate original dirt dig sounds  
- Rooted Dirt and Soul Soil imitate original dirt step sounds  
- Scaffolding imitates original ladder step sounds  
- Smoker imitates original furnace cooking sounds  
- Dolphin Splashes imitate original splashing sounds  
- Muted water exiting sounds  
- Muted underwater entering sounds  
- Muted underwater swimming sounds  
- Muted minecart sounds

![Image of a pig in water in Minecraft](https://i.imgur.com/dQXaFhe.png)  
**(Henry, Official ASP Mascot)**
